sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76565" key="paidariotro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιδᾰρ-ιοτρόφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n76565.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who keeps young slaves</tr_>, prob. in Judeich <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Altertümer von Hierapolis</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Petr.:270" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">270</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
